calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Off Calendar

Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a continued hearing re: Default Prove-Up.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael Weiss, Deputy City Attorney appearing for Plaintiff, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PORFERIA BULFA, Trustee of the PORFERIA V. BULFA REVOCABLE TRUST.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant:

The court finds in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant and enters Default Judgment and Permanent Injuction. Court signed Default and Permanent Injuction in open court.

Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Mar-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael Weiss, Deputy City Attorney appearing for Plaintiff, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
David Herring of The Housing Inspection Services, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PORFERIA BULFA, Trustee of the PORFERIA V. BULFA REVOCABLE TRUST. Porferia Bulfa was present in court.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The court finds in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant and enters Default Judgment and Permanent Injuction. Court ordered matter continued to Thursday March 6, 2014 at 9:00 AM. Court ordered counsel to submit by the close of business of tomorrow March 5, 2014 a copy of the proposed judgment directly to Department 514 with the corrections as instructed by the court.
Court adjourned.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
